company_basics.service_area: Northern and Central New Jersey, including Hudson, Bergen, Essex, Union, Middlesex, and Morris counties
licenses_and_certs: New Jersey Home Improvement Contractor Registration #13VH00000000
GAF commercial roofing systems trained crews

primary_usp.headline: We help New Jersey commercial owners catch roof problems early, document the condition clearly, and plan repairs before they become tenant emergencies.
primary_usp.supporting_detail: The company is positioned around practical, documented assessments for occupied commercial buildings. Owners get photos, plain-English findings, and a prioritized repair or replacement plan.

additional_usps.headline: Occupied-building work without tenant disruption
additional_usps.supporting_detail: Crews stage work around tenant access, deliveries, and operating hours so property managers are not fielding avoidable complaints.

additional_usps.headline: Photo-documented inspections and written recommendations
additional_usps.supporting_detail: Every assessment includes roof photos, issue notes, priority levels, and a clear next-step recommendation instead of a vague verbal estimate.

additional_usps.headline: Fast leak response for portfolio owners
additional_usps.supporting_detail: The team handles urgent leak calls while also identifying the deferred maintenance patterns that caused them.

signature_projects.outcome_summary: Targeted low-slope roof restoration completed over two weekends with no tenant access disruption
Phased TPO replacement with active loading docks kept open throughout the project
Leak remediation and drainage corrections reduced repeat service calls across six tenant spaces

brand_voice.tone: direct, practical, contractor-to-owner; confident without hype, specific without sounding automated
phrases_to_avoid: I hope this email finds you well

customer_praise_themes.theme: clear documentation before asking for a decision
customer_praise_themes.example_quote: They showed us photos, priorities, and what could wait. It was easy to explain the decision internally.
The work was planned around our tenants and we did not get surprise complaints.
They got someone out quickly, stopped the active leak, and gave us a plan for the bigger roof issue.

market_positioning.desired_reputation: the practical New Jersey commercial roofing team owners call when they need a clear roof condition read and a repair plan they can trust
market_positioning.price_positioning: mid-market, value based on documentation and reliability

sender_identity.sender_title: Commercial Roofing Advisor, Garden State Commercial Roofing
